initial_location_description: A dense, misty forest at the foot of a towering mountain. Dark pine trees loom like giants, and the air is thick with a cold, damp fog. The ground is uneven and covered in moss.
initial_bgm: mysterious and atmospheric with low woodwinds

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] We're finally here, Nezuko. Mt. Sagiri. The air... it feels so heavy.
main_dialogue.tone: Determined but physically strained. The voice is thick with fatigue but carries a core of resolve.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting the straps of the wooden box on his back

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Out of the thick mountain mist, a figure emerges. A man wearing a bright red tengu mask and a blue kimono patterned with clouds stands silently, his presence as immovable as the mountain itself.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Who... who are you? I'm looking for Sakonji Urokodaki! Giyu Tomioka sent me!
main_dialogue.tone: Startled and breathless, shouting slightly to be heard through the fog.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The masked man does not move. 'You are too weak,' he says, his voice a gravelly rumble behind the mask. 'If you cannot even handle the thin air at the base, you will never survive the peak.'
main_dialogue.tone: Harsh, blunt, and authoritative. A voice that demands respect and admits no weakness.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I can do it! I'll do whatever it takes to help Nezuko! Please, give me a chance!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate but burning with a fierce, underlying fire. High energy and pleading.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deep bow of respect, hands pressed to thighs

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The man turns and vanishes into the mist with impossible speed. 'Follow me. If you reach the summit before dawn, I will consider you.'

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Wait! Don't leave! [gasp] I have to keep up... I can't lose his scent!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and frantic, struggling against the lack of oxygen.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Rely on your sense of smell to detect the hidden traps.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [sniffing] I can smell it... the scent of fresh lacquer and sharpened iron... there's a trap right there!
branching_dialogue.tone: Highly focused and analytical. The 'Eureka' moment.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro leaps over a hidden tripwire just as a barrage of sharpened logs swings through the space he occupied a second ago.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [exhausted] I... I made it to the top... I'm still... breathing...
branching_dialogue.tone: Utterly drained but victorious. A quiet, raspy whisper.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The masked man stands by a small hut. He watches Tanjiro collapse at his feet. 'You have a keen nose, boy. And more importantly, you did not give up. I am Sakonji Urokodaki. Your training begins now.'
branching_dialogue.tone: Respectful and solemn. A slight softening of the previous harshness.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Push through with sheer physical speed and reflexes.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I just have to... be faster! I won't let some traps stop me!
branching_dialogue.tone: Aggressive and stubborn. Pushing his body past its limits.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro is battered by stones and nearly falls into a pit of bamboo spikes. He is bleeding and bruised, but his legs refuse to stop moving.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Is... that the hut? I... did it...
branching_dialogue.tone: Faint and wavering. The voice of someone on the verge of fainting.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Urokodaki catches the boy before he hits the ground. 'Your technique was reckless, but your spirit is iron. I will teach you the way of the sword.'
branching_dialogue.tone: Stern but acknowledging. The voice of a master impressed by grit.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The fog is even denser here. The ground is littered with leaves and hidden pits. Bamboo traps and swinging logs are visible through the haze, and the air is noticeably thinner.
A small, modest wooden hut perched on a ledge near the summit. A small garden and a training clearing are visible. The first rays of the morning sun are beginning to turn the sky a soft purple.
A small, modest wooden hut perched on a ledge near the summit. A small garden and a training clearing are visible. The first rays of the morning sun are beginning to turn the sky a soft purple.
